title: Project Management Protocol of the Netherlands eScience Center
author: Bakhshi, R.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A comprehensive project management protocol of the Netherlands eScience Center providing guidelines, best practices, and standardized procedures for effective  project execution of eScience projects. This document covers project lifecycle, its management, project team roles and responsibilities, and communication.
steps_raw: A comprehensive project management protocol of the Netherlands eScience Center providing guidelines, best practices, and standardized procedures for effective  project execution of eScience projects. This document covers project lifecycle, its management, project team roles and responsibilities, and communication.
